summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fractal Platform backend APIs and frontend functionality. All critical endpoints working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate. Frontend pages load successfully with functional charts, tab switching, and horizon controls for BTC, SPX, and DXY fractals.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint /api/health - responds with status ok
BTC focus-pack endpoint /api/fractal/v2.1/focus-pack?focus=30d - returns forecast/overlay data
SPX focus-pack endpoint /api/spx/v2.1/focus-pack?horizon=30d - returns forecast/overlay data
DXY terminal endpoint /api/fractal/dxy/terminal?focus=30d - returns core price/hybrid path
All horizon variations (7d, 14d, 30d, 90d) working for both BTC and SPX endpoints
BTC Fractal frontend page loads with chart and controls
Tab switching functional: Synthetic, Replay, Hybrid tabs work correctly
SPX Fractal page accessible at /fractal/spx - shows BULLISH SPX forecast
DXY Fractal page accessible at /fractal/dxy - shows BEARISH USD forecast
Charts update correctly when switching between different tabs and horizons
Expected outcomes sections display Bear/Base/Bull case percentages
Risk & Position sections show appropriate risk levels
Historical matches display correctly with phase information
No critical errors or broken functionality found
